global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup process for a card service.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are displayed in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A prominent rectangular area in the center contains text and shapes, designed to draw attention.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular decorative element is positioned within the main content area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Signup message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Secure & simple Fast signup; instant card' is prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup; instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'EarnPath' is displayed in a small font at the top left corner, serving as the logo.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline and main content are centered, with the logo at the top left and the CTA at the bottom.
